rationale_source: F2.AC exit path: broker provides collateral details → collateral_offered=true → workflow transitions from awaiting_collateral → active

collateral_offered.rationale: Event-1 collateralOffer message provides 2nd property as additional security; F2.AC collateral_offered flag set.

workflow_state.rationale: F2.AC exit path: collateral_offered=true transitions back to active per R10-C-1 inverse. HARNESS-CAPTURE NOTE (Bug-7 diagnosis, 2026-05-31): Vienna processes this correctly — parseCollateralReply='yes' → status flipped to 'active' + collateral_offered=true PERSISTED (confirmed via direct Supabase read: dbStatus=active, collateral_offered=true). The replay capture layer mis-read 'awaiting_collateral' (capture-ordering: read around the in-flight status update). The broker-silence is the legitimate Group-L behavior (deal proceeds; admin gets the prelim). B07 is a canonical harness-capture-ordering example, NOT a Vienna defect — same class as E05. The assertion must read terminal-stable state.

outbound_emails.rationale: After F2.AC exit, standard prelim path resumes.
